title: A rooted, dual-method phylogeny of the bacterial Hfq family
description: Analysis code and derived data for a rooted, dual-method (maximum-likelihood + Bayesian) phylogeny of the bacterial Hfq family, with archaeal SmAP outgroup rooting and structural verification of tips by ESMFold and Foldseek. Companion to the Sm/Lsm superfamily study (bio-b).
